title: Get Payment Portfolios
content:
Use this endpoint to retrieve the list of Payment Portfolios that belong to the same client as the Business Center. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/payment_portfolio/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |--- |--- |--- | |bc_id{Required}|string|ID of a Business Center.

By default, the response will include the Payment Portfolios that belong to the same client as the Business Center, even though some of them are not linked to the Business Center.| |filtering|object|Filtering conditions.| #|payment_portfolio_ids|string[]|IDs of the Payment Portfolios to filter the results by.
Max size: 10.
Invalid Payment Portfolio IDs, once specified, will be ignored.| #|payment_portfolio_type|string|The type of the Payment Portfolio.

Enum values:
  • `SHARED`: Advanced Payment Portfolio. For Advanced Payment Portfolios, funds are centrally managed and jointly used by all linked ad accounts.
  • `NON_SHARED`: Standard Payment Portfolio. For Standard Payment Portfolios, funds are individually managed for each linked ad account.
| #|bc_related|boolean|Whether to only return the Payment Portfolios that are linked to the Business Center.

Supported values: `true`, `false`.| |page|integer|Current page number.

Default value: 1.
Value range: ≥ 1.| |page_size|integer|Page size.

Default value: 10.
Value range: 1-50.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/payment_portfolio/get/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&page=1&page_size=50' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #|payment_portfolio_list|object[]|A list of Payment Portfolios.| ##|payment_portfolio_id|string|The ID of the Payment Portfolio.| ##|payment_portfolio_name|string|The name of the Payment Portfolio.| ##|payment_portfolio_type|string|The type of the Payment Portfolio.

Enum values:
  • `SHARED`: Advanced Payment Portfolio. For Advanced Payment Portfolios, funds are centrally managed and jointly used by all linked ad accounts.
  • `NON_SHARED`: Standard Payment Portfolio. For Standard Payment Portfolios, funds are individually managed for each linked ad account.
| ##|linked_advertiser_account_count|number|The number of ad accounts linked to the Payment Portfolio.| ##|user_count|number|The number of users that have access to the Payment Portfolio.| ##|cash_balance_list|object[]|The list of cash balances within the Payment Portfolio.| ###|currency|string|Currency.| ###|amount|number|The balance amount in the currency.| ##|credit_line_allocation|object|The details of credit line allocation for the Payment Portfolio.| ###|allocated_amount|number|The total allocated credit line amount for the Payment Portfolio.| ###|used_amount|number|The used credit line amount for the Payment Portfolio.| ###|available_amount|number|The available credit line amount for the Payment Portfolio.

Formula: `available_amount` = `allocated_amount` - `used_amount`.| ###|min_allocation_percentage|number|The minimum allocation percentage, kept to four decimal places.
The percentage is equal to the used credit line percentage for the Payment Portfolio.| #|page_info|object|Pagination information.| ##|page|number|Current page number.| ##|page_size|number|Page size.| ##|total_number|number|Total number of results.| ##|total_page|number|Total pages of results.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "page_info": { "page": 1, "page_size": 50, "total_number": 2, "total_page": 1 }, "payment_portfolios": [ { "cash_balance_list": [ { "amount": 0, "currency": "USD" } ], "credit_line_allocation": { "allocated_amount": 0, "available_amount": 0, "min_allocation_percentage": 0, "used_amount": 0 }, "linked_advertiser_account_count": 0, "payment_portfolio_id": "{{payment_portfolio_id}}", "payment_portfolio_name": "{{payment_portfolio_name}}", "payment_portfolio_type": "SHARED", "user_count": 7 }, { "cash_balance_list": [ { "amount": 0, "currency": "USD" } ], "credit_line_allocation": { "allocated_amount": 0, "available_amount": 0, "min_allocation_percentage": 0, "used_amount": 0 }, "linked_advertiser_account_count": 2, "payment_portfolio_id": "{{payment_portfolio_id}}", "payment_portfolio_name": "{{payment_portfolio_name}}", "payment_portfolio_type": "SHARED", "user_count": 7 } ] } } (/code) ```
